note: The one events file. The app sorts future events to the top and moves past ones into the archive automatically — this page can never go stale. Admin > Events can draft entries and download a merged copy of this file to publish. Entries with sample:true render with a SAMPLE chip; replace them with real dates.

events.title: FCDC Faith & Community Development Conference
events.body: The Faith Community Development Corporation's annual gathering: congregations, municipalities, and funders in one room. Organizations may register to attend or join as a paid sponsor — sponsors get the stage, the program book, and the room.

events.title: Hartford HealthCare Community Job Fair
events.body: The CT Faith Jobs Collaborative and Hartford HealthCare bring hiring managers to the community — bring your resume, leave with next steps. Apply through the Trainings tab to get matched before the fair.

events.title: MLK Corridors Initiative — City Briefing
events.body: A look back at the corridor work in Norwalk, Middletown, and New Britain — and the playbook for bringing the corridor to the next city.
